files.patch:
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ jobs:
         env:
           CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
         run: |
-          ~/.cargo/bin/dist build --installer sh --installer powershell
+          ~/.cargo/bin/dist build --installer shell --installer powershell
       - name: Checksums
         run: |
           find target/dist -type f ! -name "*.sha256" -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
